case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC VS. DIONISIA MANANSALA ET AL

docket_entries.description: CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210016933) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210016933) TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100182458) FILED BY DEFENDANT MANANSALA, DIONISIA AN INDIVIDUAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-03-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-15-2025 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210016933) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MANANSALA, DIONISIA AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-21-2023

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210031683) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MANANSALA, DIONISIA AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR JUL-15-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE MAY-03-2023 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANANSALA, DIONISIA AN INDIVIDUAL $7,928.23 PRINCIPAL, $518.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,446.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
